Because they have been carefully designed and bred over dozens generations pilot BattleMechs MechWarriors are considered to have the Natural Aptitude Trait (below) for all the skills in the Clan MechWarrior Field. NATURAL APTITUDE (multiple trait) Cost: 1-2 The character has natural flair for one skill , allowing him to advance in that skill more quickly: Add +4 to the total of the 84
